zh.lifeSummary: 當Raimondo della Volta於1170年出生在義大利馬薩 E 卡拉拉利其亞納 納迪瓦藍諾時，他的父親Umberto della Volta27歲，母親Simonetta30歲。他和Simona Camilla至少有1個女兒。他去世於1250年6月27日之前。

nameMeanings.name: della
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Carmine, Geno, Amelio, Aniello, Concetta, Cosmo, Flavio, Gaetano, Gennaro, Mafalda, Raffaele.
Italian: habitational name from any of numerous minor places called Cella or Celle (from cella ‘cell’), because they were once the locations of hermits’ cells.

nameMeanings.name: Volta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called with the word volta ‘turn’, ‘vault’.
from a shortened form of a medieval personal name such as Bonavolta, literally ‘good fortune’, or Malavolta ‘bad fortune’.

nameMeanings.name: Raimondo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Raimondo della Volta was born in 1170, in Varano, Licciana Nardi, Massa e Carrara, Italy, his father, Umberto della Volta, was 27 and his mother, Simonetta, was 30. He had at least 1 daughter with Simona Camilla. He died before 27 June 1250.

ko.Varano, Licciana Nardi, Massa e Carrara,: 이탈리아 마사  카라라 리c샤나 나르디 바랜오

ko.lifeSummary: Raimondo della Volta(이)가 1170년 이탈리아 마사  카라라 리c샤나 나르디 바랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Umberto della Volta(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Simonetta(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Simona Camilla(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 6월 27일 이전 사망했다.
